name: Swingers Indoor Golf
address: 317 S State St, Oscoda Township, MI 48750
about: Swingers Indoor Golf is a premier indoor golf simulator venue located in Oscoda, Michigan, offering year-round access to state-of-the-art technology and a welcoming atmosphere. The facility is equipped with ProTee VX Overhead launch monitors and GSPro software, featuring over 350 community-built courses and support for up to four players per bay. Rentals are available by the hour, allowing golfers to hit the range or play a full round on top courses worldwide. The venue offers a selection of non-alcoholic drinks and apparel for sale, with options from Bahami Style, including shirts, accessories, and golf gloves. Swingers caters to a diverse clientele, from beginners to serious golfers, providing a relaxed environment for practice, play, and league participation.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced ProTee VX Overhead launch monitor technology for precise shot data
GSPro software offering over 350 community courses with multiplayer support
Relaxed, welcoming atmosphere suitable for players of all skill levels

food_and_drink.notes: No alcohol service mentioned; only non-alcoholic drinks available.

simulator_hardware.notes: Dual high-speed camera system with slow-motion impact viewing.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue does not specify whether club rentals are available, so it is recommended to bring your own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: The venue offers a selection of non-alcoholic drinks for sale but does not mention outside food or drink policies.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time required to play 18 holes is not specified, but hourly bay rentals are available for practice or full rounds.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Swingers Indoor Golf is described as welcoming and suitable for families, with kid-friendly amenities like non-alcoholic drinks and a relaxed atmosphere.
